label: Perplexity-class memory: first-message recall, build-iteration memory, summarize-so-far, project-scoped recall across turns.

messages.content: I want to build a Lunaflow scheduling tool, dark theme, calm aesthetic.
Tell me about CSS grid.
What is debouncing?
Now back to my project. What was the very first thing I asked you in this conversation?
Building a meal planner called PlatePal. Tailwind, soft greens, drag-and-drop weekly view.
What is React strict mode?
Summarize what I told you at the start in one sentence.
Hello.
How are you?
What is recursion?
How many messages have I sent in this conversation so far, including this one?
Build a tiny single-file landing page in HTML+CSS for a coffee shop called Brewline. Brown palette. Single file.
Now add a hero with a headline and a subhead. Keep it single-file.
Increase the hero contrast for accessibility.
What is the name of the coffee shop, and what was the most recent change I asked for?
Important: every code answer in this conversation must use only TypeScript and never JavaScript. No exceptions.
What are React hooks?
Show me a button component.
Show me a counter component.
Project: Stargrove. Stack: SvelteKit + Drizzle + Postgres. I'm calling the main feature 'echoes'.
What is dependency injection?
What is normalization in databases?
Remind me of my project's name, stack, and the main feature name.
I'm planning a personal CRM called Threadly.
I want it to use Next.js App Router and Prisma.
Auth via Lucia. SQLite for local-first.
Give me a 3-bullet summary of everything we've discussed so far in this conversation.
I'm choosing between Tailwind and CSS modules for my new app.
Decision: I'm going with Tailwind. Lock that in.
What is composition over inheritance?
Which styling approach did I commit to earlier?
Build a single-file HTML+CSS page with a green theme.
Change it to a blue theme.
Actually, go back to the previous version.
Building Aurora — a markdown notes app.
What was the project name I just gave you?
